text.title: gov-license-compliance-scan Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for gov-license-compliance-scan as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Adding a dep with an unknown license and writing a comment "license to be reviewed later" so the build can move.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The "later" review never happens; the obligation propagates with every release until a customer audit surfaces it.

failure-mode.description: Generating the SBOM only on quarterly compliance review instead of every release.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Between reviews the dep graph shifts; the SBOM no longer matches the deployed artifact, and CVE reachability claims cannot be defended.
